message:
feat(assign): add assignment tracking and file reservation system

Introduces two new packages for managing bead-to-agent assignments and
coordinating file access across concurrent agents:

**Assignment System (internal/assignment/)**

Provides persistent tracking of which beads are assigned to which agents,
enabling visibility into work distribution and assignment history.

Key capabilities:
- AssignmentStore: Thread-safe store for bead->agent mappings
- Assignment lifecycle: assigned -> working -> completed/failed/reassigned
- Persistence: JSON-based storage in .ntm/assignments/<session>.json
- Rich error types: PersistenceError, InvalidTransitionError, NotFoundError
- Statistics: Real-time counts by status for dashboard integration

Core types:
- Assignment: bead_id, pane, agent_type, agent_name, status, timestamps
- AssignmentStore: session-scoped store with mutex protection
- AssignmentStats: aggregate counts for quick status overview

**File Reservation Manager (internal/assign/)**

Integrates with MCP Agent Mail to automatically extract and reserve file
paths from bead titles/descriptions, preventing edit conflicts.

Features:
- ExtractFilePaths(): Smart path extraction using regex patterns
  - Explicit paths: src/api/handler.go, lib/utils.ts
  - Glob patterns: internal/**/*.go, *.json
  - Package references: internal/cli, pkg/api
  - Dotfiles: .env, .gitignore, .eslintrc.js
- GlobToPattern(): Converts globs to Agent Mail-compatible patterns
- FileReservationManager: Coordinates with agentmail.Client for reservations
- Batch operations: Reserve paths for multiple beads atomically

Supports --reserve-files flag for assign command to automatically protect
files mentioned in bead content before sending prompts to agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
